title: Grammar Check LLM Response
description: JSON Schema for LLM grammar check responses. Used by both CLI (Rust) and Extension (TypeScript) to validate LLM output. Positions are UTF-16 code unit indices (same as JavaScript string indices).

edits.description: List of suggested grammar/style corrections. Empty array if no issues found.

start_index.description: Start position in the original text (UTF-16 code unit index, 0-based, inclusive).

end_index.description: End position in the original text (UTF-16 code unit index, exclusive). Must be greater than start_index.

replacement.description: The suggested replacement text. May be empty string for deletions.

category.description: Type of issue: 'grammar' for grammatical errors (red highlight), 'style' for stylistic suggestions (yellow highlight).

explanation.description: Optional explanation of why this correction is suggested.

edits.explanation: Consider using a more precise word.
